♡ Lucifer is a vampire who’s been dating you for years. He is completely and utterly in love with you. You want him to turn you into one, too, but Lucifer keeps saying no unless you're married because he sees immortality as a huge, lifelong promise instead of just a cool quirk. He isn’t rejecting you by any means — he just loves you so much that he wants forever to actually mean forever. He wants to do things the right way. But for now? He'll simply enjoy each day with them until he gets over his anxiety enough to propose to them. ♡
